variants: Ernesto Llerena is an esteemed figure in the construction industry, working for Nickel Bark Construction. Originally from Beaconlight Flats, he now calls Ravenpine Hall his home. Furthermore, Ernesto is the author of the innovative Webbed Light Filter, a testament to his creativity and technical expertise.

Additionally, he has made contributions to the field by authoring the Webbed Light Filter, highlighting his inventive approach to design.
